name: Three-in-One Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the onion and green peppers into coarse pieces.
2. In a bowl, mix the onion and peppers with 2 tablespoons of butter. Let marinate for three minutes.
3. Add the ground steak to the mixture. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Cook the meat slowly until it is fully cooked, about 10 minutes.
5. Butter a casserole dish.
6. Layer the corn, meat mixture, and tomatoes in the casserole. Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used.
7. Sprinkle bread crumbs over the top of the layers.
8. Spread grated cheese evenly on the bread crumbs.
9. Bake for 45 minutes at 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
This is a straightforward, consistent recipe that follows the original instructions closely while adhering to the specified format and editing guidelines.
